prestazioni: Franklin O-335 flat-six engine (6AL) overhaul with forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft by Bryant Racing to handle 400+ HP reliably. Replace the stock Stromberg carburetors with a modern fuel injection system using a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU and ID1000x injectors for precise fuel delivery and boost compatibility.

Custom turbocharged setup utilizing a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate, paired with a custom air-to-water intercooler by PWR and a TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valve. Exhaust system features 2.5-inch mandrel-bent stainless steel piping with a custom 3-inch merge collector and a Borla Pro XS muffler for optimal flow and sound.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Replace the stock Borg-Warner 3-speed transmission with a Tremec TKX 5-speed manual transmission, paired with a Tilton twin-disc clutch and a custom aluminum flywheel. Upgrade the rear differential to a Ford 9-inch with a Truetrac limited-slip differential and 3.70:1 gearing for improved acceleration and durability.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using hand-formed aluminum panels by Ringbrothers, extending the fenders by 3 inches to accommodate the wider track and aggressive stance. Front splitter and rear diffuser fabricated from carbon fiber by APR Performance, designed specifically for the Tucker 48's aerodynamic profile.

Retro-modern lighting upgrade: Replace the stock sealed-beam headlights with custom Hella 90mm LED projectors housed in billet aluminum buckets, and install sequential LED taillights inspired by the Tucker's original design but updated with modern technology by Diode Dynamics. Side markers feature clear lenses with amber LED inserts for a sleek look.

Interior reimagined with a full Alcantara and leather retrim by Katzkin, featuring custom door panels with integrated billet aluminum handles and a bespoke center console housing a 10-inch Android Auto/Apple CarPlay touchscreen by Pioneer. The stock steering wheel is replaced with a Nardi Classic 380mm wheel wrapped in Alcantara, paired with a custom billet aluminum quick-release hub.
